en: I think middle seat people have lost their minds.
I don't know who lied to middle seat people,
ko: 누가 가운데 좌석한테 거짓말을 한 건지 모르겠지만,

en: but you have no armrests, okay?
We share our armrests out of the goodness of our heart,
ko: 우리가 착한 마음으로 팔걸이를 나눠주는 거지,

en: but you have no, and the energy that these,
ko: 원래 없어, 그리고 가운데 좌석 에너지가,

en: middle seat people are barely on the flight, okay?
ko: 가운데 좌석은 거의 비행기에 타지도 않은 수준이야, 알겠지?

en: They're the only seat in every row
ko: 모든 줄에서 안 나타나면 축하하는 유일한 좌석이야.

en: that if they don't show up, we celebrate.
We take a picture of their empty seat
and we put it on Instagram and we go,
what a Tuesday, man.
ko: 가운데 좌석이 노트북 꺼내는 거 본 적 있어?

en: You ever seen a middle seat person pull out a laptop?
ko: 내가 본 것 중 가장 미친 짓이야.

en: It's the craziest thing I've ever seen.
ko: 쳐다보면서 이러고 싶은 걸 참기 힘들어,

en: It's so hard for me not to look at them and go,
ko: 야, 가운데 좌석 이메일 기다리는 사무실은 없어, 알겠지?

en: hey, nobody's in an office
waiting on a middle seat email, okay?
If anybody cared about your email,
you'd be in the aisle, big dog.
I mean, it's hard for me.
I just want to reach over and just close the laptop
and go, you need to get your Kindle out, okay?
You need to read a story.
